/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [State])
 * 
 * Type-preserving State.mycopy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: State = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: State = state.mycopy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: State = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: State = state.mycopy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see State
 * @see State.Loaded
 * @see State.Loading
 */
public fun snap.funname.State.mycopy(
    id: String = this.id,
): snap.funname.State = when (this) {
    is snap.funname.State.Loaded -> this.copy(id = id)
    is snap.funname.State.Loading -> this.copy(id = id)
}

package snap.funname

@SealedCopy(funName = "my" + DefaultCopyFunctionName)
